title: fragaria viridis subvar. magnusiana
intro: Fragaria viridis subvar. magnusiana, also known as the green strawberry or wild strawberry, is a subvariety of the green strawberry plant, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been employed to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Fragaria viridis subvar. magnusiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
